3133490.name: Fantasy Grounds - D&D Quests from the Infinite Staircase
3133490.description:
D&D Quests from the Infinite Staircase

Enter the Infinite Staircase – a dreamlike expanse with doors leading to fantastical worlds.
This anthology weaves a cosmic thread through six classic DUNGEONS & DRAGONS adventures, updated for the game’s fifth edition. You can run these unforgettable quests individually or as a worlds-spanning campaign.
Quests from the Infinite Staircase embraces the magic of the most beloved adventures of all time. As you explore what lies beyond each door, embark on timeless adventures and make memorable moments with your party.
A DUNGEONS & DRAGONS adventure for 1st to 13th level characters.
For use with the fifth edition Player’s Handbook, Monster Manual, and Dungeon Master’s Guide.
Quests from the Infinite Staircase features six remastered classic adventures from Dungeons & Dragons history: The Lost City, When a Star Falls, Beyond the Crystal Cave, Pharaoh, The Lost Caverns of Tsojcanth, and Expeditions to the Barrier Peaks. Introduce these timeless tales into any campaign, no matter how you choose to play!
The Lost City
In this introductory adventure, explore a buried ziggurat to uncover the remnants of a once-glorious kingdom.
When a Star Falls
Retrieve a fallen star and defend the power of prophecy against those with malicious intent in this cosmic adventure.
Beyond the Crystal Caves
Venture into the Feywild to find two young lovers in an enchanted fairytale garden.
Pharaoh
Delve into an ancient tomb as you seek to lift curses and bring peace to the ghost of a long-dead pharaoh.
The Lost Caverns of Tsojcanth
Brave deadly threats and tenacious monsters as you wander the archmage Iggwilv’s former lair. If you survive, you’ll claim treasure beyond your wildest dreams.
Expedition to the Barrier Peaks
Set on a crashed spaceship, this science-fiction adventure features malfunctioning robots, futuristic technology, and a deceptively cheery artificial antagonist.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Zacchaeus
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and the included D&D fifth edition ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
